definition.name: Building retrofit alternatives
definition.description: Compare a downside, base, and upside implementation case with reproducible sensitivity and threshold analysis.

alternatives.label: Upside case
non_financial_caveats: Grant award is not yet confirmed

metric_trace.label: Net present value
metric_trace.formula: Σ net cash flow_t / (1 + periodic discount rate)^t
metric_trace.notes: Includes every modeled cash-flow category.

metric_trace.label: Simple payback
metric_trace.formula: First undiscounted cumulative crossing, interpolated within period
metric_trace.notes: Does not discount cash flows after the recovery point.

metric_trace.label: Discounted payback
metric_trace.formula: First discounted cumulative crossing, interpolated within period
metric_trace.notes: Uses the disclosed annual discount rate converted to the selected frequency.

metric_trace.label: Internal rate of return
metric_trace.formula: Rate where NPV equals zero
metric_trace.notes: All detected roots are reported; multiple sign changes suppress a single IRR.

metric_trace.label: Modified internal rate of return
metric_trace.formula: (FV positive flows / PV negative flows)^(1/n) - 1
metric_trace.notes: Uses disclosed finance and reinvestment rates.

metric_trace.label: Profitability index
metric_trace.formula: PV of all inflows / PV of all outflows
metric_trace.notes: Includes grants and rebates as project inflows.

metric_trace.label: Benefit-cost ratio
metric_trace.formula: PV of benefits / PV of costs
metric_trace.notes: Grants and rebates are excluded as transfers rather than treated as benefits.

metric_trace.label: Equivalent annual value
metric_trace.formula: NPV × annual capital-recovery factor
metric_trace.notes: Expresses NPV as an equivalent annual amount over the analysis horizon.

metric_trace.label: Terminal value
metric_trace.formula: Residual value + working-capital recovery - decommissioning cost in final period
metric_trace.notes: Reports only terminal categories occurring in the final analysis period.

flags: Nominal/real price and discount-rate bases match.
Cash-flow table reconciles across 11 periods including period 0.
